title: Formula 1 splashes
description: Hello, Alesc here, i want to say that this niche project is now discontinued, I just wanted to say i am thankful for 200 downloads. AFAIK this can be used in the new minecraft versions.
body:
**If your a formula 1 fan and plays minecraft, This resource pack is for you! This resource pack changes the splash text of minecraft to iconic f1 quotes, memes, and team radio!**
![Sebastian Vettel's: "There's something loose between my leg!"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0b91c8deb5db701f79f56cfa394f89b916a7f91.png)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This pack includes:

Lewis, It's Hammertime!

He won in Spa, He wins in Monza!

If you no longer go for a gap that exists, you're no longer a racing driver.

Aerodynamics are for people who can't build engines!

I am an artist. The track is my canvas and the car is my brush.

Bono, my tyres are gone!

It's Rawe Ceek!

There's something loose between my legs!

Leave me alone i know what to do!

I am stupid, I am stupid.

Ki ki ki, oi oi oi!

It's Friday theeeen..., It's Saturday sunday what!

ALL THE TIME YOU HAVE TO LEAVE A SPACE!

For whaaat?!

</details>
